title: Gear Up
description: Overhauls the tool and armor progression system by rebalancing durability and core stats, creating a more consistent and engaging gameplay experience.
body:
**Gameplay Changes:**
- One of the main goals of this pack is to integrate copper into the base progression. This is achieved by making the stone pickaxe unable to mine iron, requiring a copper pickaxe instead. Additionally, copper tools can now mine redstone.
- On the other hand this pack reworks gold to become a viable alternative by enhancing its stats to rival or exceed copper, while retaining its unique advantages.

**Durability Changes:**
As the main feature of this pack, the following table shows the new durability values for each tier, along with their changes compared to vanilla.

|            |  Wooden   |   Stone   |   Copper   |    Iron    |  Diamond   | Netherite  |  Golden   |
|------------|:---------:|:---------:|:----------:|:----------:|:----------:|:----------:|:---------:|
| Durability |  64 (+5)  | 128 (-3)  | 256 (+66)  | 512 (+262) | 1024 (-537)| 2048 (+17) | 320 (+288)|

|            |   Copper   |    Iron    |  Diamond   | Netherite  |  Leather  |  Golden   | Chainmail |  Turtle   |
|------------|:----------:|:----------:|:----------:|:----------:|:---------:|:---------:|:---------:|:---------:|
| Helmet     | 208 (+87)  | 312 (+147) | 416 (+53)  | 520 (+113) | 78 (+23)  | 234 (+157)| 286 (+121)| 260 (-15) |
| Chestplate | 256 (+80)  | 384 (+144) | 512 (-16)  | 640 (+48)  | 96 (+16)  | 288 (+176)| 352 (+112)|     /     |
| Leggings   | 240 (+75)  | 360 (+135) | 480 (-15)  | 600 (+45)  | 90 (+15)  | 270 (+165)| 330 (+105)|     /     |
| Boots      | 192 (+49)  | 288 (+93)  | 384 (-45)  | 480 (-1)   | 72 (+7)   | 216 (+125)| 264 (+69) |     /     |

**Stats Changes:**
Since this pack does not aim to significantly deviate from the vanilla gameplay style, many tools retain their original attributes, with changes made primarily for consistency.

<details>
<summary>Swords</summary>

|              | Wooden |  Stone | Copper |  Iron  | Diamond | Netherite | Golden |
| ------------ | :----: | :----: | :----: | :----: | :-----: | :-------: | :----: |
| Damage       | 3 (-1) | 4 (-1) |    5   |    6   |    7    |     8     | 5 (+1) |
| Attack Speed |   1.6  |   1.6  |   1.6  |   1.6  |   1.6   |    1.6    |   1.6  |

</details>

<details>
<summary>Axes</summary>

|              | Wooden |  Stone |   Copper   |  Iron  | Diamond | Netherite | Golden |
| ------------ | :----: | :----: | :--------: | :----: | :-----: | :-------: | :----: |
| Damage       | 5 (-2) | 6 (-3) |   7 (-2)   | 8 (-1) |    9    |    10     |    7   |
| Attack Speed |   0.8  |   0.8  | 0.9 (+0.1) |   0.9  |    1    |     1     |    1   |

</details>

<details>
  
<summary>Pickaxes</summary>

|              | Wooden | Stone | Copper |  Iron  |  Diamond  |  Netherite  | Golden |
| ------------ | :----: | :---: | :----: | :----: | :-------: | :---------: | :----: |
| Damage       |    2   |   3   | 4 (+1) | 5 (+1) |   6 (+1)  |    7 (+1)   | 4 (+2) |
| Attack Speed |   1.2  |  1.2  |   1.2  |   1.2  |    1.2    |     1.2     |   1.2  |

</details>

<details>
  
<summary>Shovels</summary>

|              |  Wooden  |   Stone  | Copper |  Iron  |  Diamond  |  Netherite  |  Golden  |
| ------------ | :------: | :------: | :----: | :----: | :-------: | :---------: | :------: |
| Damage       | 1.5 (-1) | 2.5 (-1) |   3.5  |   4.5  |    5.5    |     6.5     | 3.5 (+1) |
| Attack Speed |     1    |     1    |    1   |    1   |     1     |      1      |     1    |

</details>

<details>
<summary>Hoes</summary>

|              |   Wooden   | Stone |   Copper   |  Iron  |  Diamond   |  Netherite   |  Golden  |
| ------------ | :--------: | :---: | :--------: | :----: | :--------: | :----------: | :------: |
| Damage       |      1     |   1   |      1     |    1   |      1     |       1      |     1    |
| Attack Speed | 1.5 (+0.5) |   2   | 2.5 (+0.5) |    3   | 3.5 (-0.5) |       4      |   4 (+3) |

</details>

<details>
  
<summary>Spears</summary>

|              |    Wooden   |    Stone    |    Copper   |     Iron    |  Diamond  |  Netherite  |   Golden    |
| ------------ | :---------: | :---------: | :---------: | :---------: | :-------: | :---------: | :---------: |
| Damage       |      1      |      2      |    3 (+1)   |    4 (+1)   |   5 (+1)  |    6 (+1)   |    3 (+2)   |
| Attack Speed | 1.5 (-0.04) | 1.3 (-0.03) | 1.2 (+0.02) | 1.1 (+0.05) | 1 (+0.05) | 0.9 (+0.03) | 1.4 (+0.35) |

</details>

**Additional Notes:**
- Due to a known issue, items obtained in Creative mode will not have their properties modified. Switch to Survival mode and update your inventory to apply the changes.
- Thanks to how the datapack works, any item obtained by a player is automatically updated, even if the pack is installed after the world is created.
